hooks.command: if [ -n "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" ]; then pnpm exec prettier --write $(echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | tr ',' ' '); fi
for f in $(echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | tr ',' ' '); do case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx) pnpm exec eslint --fix --quiet "$f";; esac; done

for f in $(echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | tr ',' ' '); do case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx) if echo "$f" | grep -qE '.*/packages/.*/src/'; then if grep -qE "from ['\"](@?react|next/|expo)" "$f" 2>/dev/null; then echo "WARNING: Shared packages must have zero framework imports. Found React/Next/Expo import in $f"; fi; fi;; esac; done; exit 0

for f in $(echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | tr ',' ' '); do [ -f "$f" ] || continue; case "$f" in */supabase/migrations/*.sql) if grep -qi "CREATE TABLE" "$f" && ! grep -qi "ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY" "$f"; then echo "WARNING: New table detected without ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY. All tables must have RLS enabled."; fi;; esac; done; exit 0

for f in $(echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | tr ',' ' '); do case "$f" in */supabase/migrations/*.sql) echo "Remember: run 'pnpm generate-types' after applying this migration to update TypeScript types.";; esac; done; exit 0

for f in $(echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | tr ',' ' '); do [ -f "$f" ] || continue; case "$f" in */apps/web/e2e/*) echo "Editing e2e tests — consider the 'writing-e2e-tests' skill.";; */supabase/functions/*) echo "Editing an edge function — consider the 'creating-edge-functions' skill.";; *.ts|*.tsx) if grep -qF '.channel(' "$f"; then echo "This file uses Supabase Realtime (.channel) — consider the 'using-realtime' skill."; fi; if grep -qE 'recharts|d3-sankey' "$f"; then echo "This file uses chart libraries — consider the 'building-charts' skill."; fi;; esac; done; exit 0

CMD=$(python3 -c "import json,os,sys; data=os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT','') or sys.stdin.read(); print(json.loads(data).get('command','') if data else '')" 2>/dev/null); case "$CMD" in *'git commit'*) WEB_CHANGES=$(git diff HEAD~1 --name-only -- apps/web/ 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$WEB_CHANGES" ]; then echo 'This commit touched apps/web/. If this is a new feature or significant change, consider running /checking-mobile-parity to check for mobile parity tickets.'; fi;; esac; exit 0

CMD=$(python3 -c "import json,os,sys; data=os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT','') or sys.stdin.read(); print(json.loads(data).get('command','') if data else '')" 2>/dev/null); case "$CMD" in *'git push'*) echo 'Push landed. Dispatch BOTH in the BACKGROUND now: background-checker (haiku, scoped lint/typecheck on changed packages) and ci-monitor (haiku, watch CI checks). Do not poll CI inline; keep working.';; esac; exit 0

CMD=$(python3 -c "import json,os,sys; data=os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT','') or sys.stdin.read(); print(json.loads(data).get('command','') if data else '')" 2>/dev/null); case "$CMD" in *'git commit'*) if git diff HEAD~1 --name-only -- apps/web/src/ 2>/dev/null | grep -qF .tsx; then echo 'This commit changed web .tsx files. Before pushing, consider dispatching the ui-verifier agent to visually verify layout (desktop + 393x852 mobile).'; fi;; esac; exit 0
for f in $(echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | tr ',' ' '); do case "$f" in */pnpm-lock.yaml|*/.env.local|*/.env|*/types.gen.ts) echo "BLOCK: Protected file: $f" && exit 2;; esac; done

REPO_ROOT="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)}"; for f in $(echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | tr ',' ' '); do case "$f" in */supabase/migrations/*.sql) git -C "$REPO_ROOT" ls-files --error-unmatch "$f" 2>/dev/null && echo "BLOCK: Cannot edit committed migration $f — create a new migration instead" && exit 2;; esac; done

for f in $(echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | tr ',' ' '); do case "$f" in */apps/web/middleware.ts) echo "BLOCK: Next.js 16 uses proxy.ts for request interception. Creating middleware.ts will break all routes (404 on every page)." && exit 2;; esac; done

CMD=$(python3 -c "import json,os,sys; data=os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT','') or sys.stdin.read(); print(json.loads(data).get('command','') if data else '')" 2>/dev/null); case "$CMD" in *'pnpm supabase'*) case "$CMD" in *'packages/supabase'*|*'--filter @trainers/supabase'*) ;; *) echo "Reminder: run 'pnpm supabase' from packages/supabase — it writes a .temp/ cache to the cwd. Use 'cd packages/supabase' or '--filter @trainers/supabase'.";; esac;; esac; exit 0

REPO_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if [ -n "$REPO_ROOT" ]; then cd "$REPO_ROOT" || exit 0; BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$BRANCH" ] && [ "$BRANCH" != 'main' ] && [ "$BRANCH" != 'master' ]; then if git rev-parse --verify main >/dev/null 2>&1; then BASE_BRANCH=main; elif git rev-parse --verify master >/dev/null 2>&1; then BASE_BRANCH=master; else BASE_BRANCH=; fi; if [ -n "$BASE_BRANCH" ]; then WEB_CHANGES=$(git diff --name-only "$BASE_BRANCH"...HEAD -- apps/web/ 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$WEB_CHANGES" ]; then echo 'This branch has apps/web/ changes. If you have added new features, run /checking-mobile-parity to check for mobile parity tickets.'; fi; fi; fi; fi; exit 0

REPO_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$REPO_ROOT" ] && exit 0; cd "$REPO_ROOT" || exit 0; BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); { [ -z "$BRANCH" ] || [ "$BRANCH" = 'main' ] || [ "$BRANCH" = 'master' ]; } && exit 0; command -v gh >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; TO=$(command -v timeout || command -v gtimeout); [ -z "$TO" ] && exit 0; PRINFO=$("$TO" 6 gh pr view --json number,reviewDecision,state --jq 'select(.state=="OPEN") | "Open PR #\(.number) on this branch — review: \(.reviewDecision // "pending"). Dispatch ci-monitor to check CI."' 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$PRINFO" ] && echo "$PRINFO"; exit 0
